name: ETH Range Failure Reacceptance v1
thesis: ETH 4h is the best-fit primary lane for a chop-first range-failure reacceptance test. The edge should come from broad reacceptance after a failed excursion from balance, not exact one-bar reversal timing.
edge_mechanism: range failure mean reversion after value reacceptance
invalidation_condition: Abort if participation remains weak, if excursion and reacceptance behavior conflict, or if post-cost edge does not survive the blind windows.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: A breakout attempt leaves balance, fails to continue, and rotates back once price reaccepts local value.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: In a choppy 4h ETH regime, false directional excursions should be common enough that reclaiming value creates a tradable return toward balance.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 4h is the cleanest primary lane because the cycle regime is 70% CHOP and the mechanism is inherently range-bound.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If ETH keeps transitioning into directional continuation instead of rejecting the excursion, the mean-reversion entry will be early.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If density is acceptable but conversions are weak, bring the target closer to balance before tightening the trigger.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; excursion and reacceptance work together
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed by proximity thresholds instead of exact candle-pattern requirements

long: Take profit: EMA_50 or 1.3 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
short: Take profit: EMA_50 or 1.3 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
